calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-03-2018 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Mtn For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Mar-15-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Alexa R. Burakoff.
Dept. 514. Judge: Cynthia Ming-Mei Lee. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Arash Moussavian, Esq. appeared for plaintiff University of Pennsylvania.
No Appearance by defendant Alexa R. Burakoff.
Default was entered against defendant Alexa R. Burakoff on April 23, 2015.
DOE defendants were dismissed on February 9, 2018.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on September 15, 2017.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff University of Pennsylvania, and against the Defaulted Defendant Alexa R. Burakoff, as follows:

Damages - $34,861.09.
Attorney Fees - $6,776.32.
Costs - $524.00.
Total - $42,161.41.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
